docket_entries.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER BLACK, ALDA GAPI

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF APR-28-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME TO ALDA CAPI. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER BLACK, ALDA GAPI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE RECORDER) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER BLACK, ALDA GAPI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER BLACK, ALDA GAPI HEARING SET FOR APR-28-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
